title: Why 70% of Lottery Winners Go Broke in 5 Years
hook: You just won $50 million — and statistically, you're broke again in five years. Here's the psychology behind why jackpots destroy lives.
angle: Sudden Wealth Syndrome and hedonic recalibration — the proven psychological forces that make windfall money disappear faster than earned money
audience: Anyone who dreams of a windfall — lottery, inheritance, big bonus — and doesn't know the psychological traps waiting for them
key_numbers: $50M jackpot becomes ~$17M after lump sum + tax
happiness resets to baseline in 12 months
